title: World Map — Tempestria to Crossroads

panels.description: Painterly world map: Riftwild Commons, Lanternveil, Aureth Vale, Tempestria peaks, Gilded Crossroads portal mark, Traitor's Gate teaser. Empty label zones.

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. Black lacquer wood and brass first; warm gold filigree, deep red merchant fabric, teal Rift glass lanterns and crystal accents. NO purple AI-fantasy neon default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic book map page for The Merchant's Secret Issue #6 — World Map — Tempestria to Crossroads. Painterly world map: Riftwild Commons, Lanternveil, Aureth Vale, Tempestria peaks, Gilded Crossroads portal mark, Traitor's Gate teaser. Empty label zones. Keeper: Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes. Spark: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Merchant: Aurelia Voss the Gilded Merchant: tall elegant merchant leader, black lacquer coat with warm gold filigree, half-veil over one eye, amber lantern pin, teal Rift glass jewelry, composed smile hiding hard bargains. Empty zones for title lettering. NO readable text in art.
